description: You are the farm manager at GAEC JOULIN, a mixed crop-and-livestock farm in Charente-Maritime, France. Log in to Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. The farm must submit its EU CAP (Common Agricultural Policy) subsidy compliance documentation for the 2024 growing season. Prepare a crop rotation plan by creating at least three new activity productions for the 2024 campaign, each assigned to a distinct land parcel. The plan must demonstrate crop rotation by using at least two different crop activity types across the three parcels and following rotation principles. All new productions must have valid growing season dates for 2024.
